note: Unified index for skills, rituals, protocols, and templates. Replaces skill-index.json (v1). Type field distinguishes layers. CLI and website both read this.

plugins.name: favicon-gen
plugins.description: Generate custom favicons from logos, text, or brand colors. Outputs favicon.svg, favicon.ico, apple-touch-icon.png, and web app manifest.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: svg-logo-designer
plugins.description: Create professional SVG logos from descriptions and design specs. Multiple variations, layouts, styles. Scalable vector output.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: logo-creator
plugins.description: Create logos using AI image generation. Discuss style, generate variations, iterate with feedback, crop, remove background, export as SVG.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: find-skills
plugins.description: Discover and install agent skills. Use when looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
plugins.author: Soma

plugins.name: remotion-best-practices
plugins.description: Best practices for Remotion — video creation in React. Compositions, animations, rendering pipeline.
plugins.author: Community

plugins.name: publish
plugins.description: Write, commit, push, and deploy a blog post to soma.gravicity.ai
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: molt
plugins.description: Review session work, extract patterns, crystallize into muscles, archive
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: breath-cycle
plugins.description: Session lifecycle management — inhale (load context), hold (work), exhale (flush state)
plugins.breadcrumb: Sessions have 3 phases: inhale (boot, load identity + memory + protocols), hold (work, track context), exhale (flush state, update heat, write preload). Never skip exhale.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: frontmatter-standard
plugins.description: All markdown documents get YAML frontmatter with type, status, created, updated
plugins.breadcrumb: All .md files get YAML frontmatter: type, status, created, updated. 8 statuses: draft/active/stable/stale/archived/deprecated/blocked/review. 12 types: plan/spec/note/index/memory/muscle/protocol/decision/log/template/identity/config.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: heat-tracking
plugins.description: Track usage frequency of protocols and patterns. Frequently used = always loaded. Unused = fade out.
plugins.breadcrumb: Protocols have temperature: cold (not loaded), warm (breadcrumb in prompt), hot (full in prompt). Heat rises on use (+1/+2), decays per session if unused (-1). Thresholds configurable in settings.json.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: identity-system
plugins.description: Layered identity — project identity inherits from parent, overrides locally. Who am I here?
plugins.breadcrumb: Identity is layered: global (~/.soma/identity.md) → project (.soma/identity.md). Project overrides global. Identity shapes tone, knowledge boundaries, and behavior. Always load identity at boot.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: amp
plugins.description: Adaptive Memory Protocol — muscles, preloads, memory hierarchy. How agents remember across sessions.
plugins.breadcrumb: Memory has layers: preload (session resume), muscles (earned patterns), STATE.md (architecture truth). Muscles promote from repetition, not instruction. Preload writes at exhale, loads at inhale.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Git and GitHub workflow strategies — branching, worktrees, merging, multi-repo ecosystems. Progressive sub-skills for project-specific patterns.
plugins.author: Curtis Mercier
